commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And they shall bring all your brethren for an offering unto the LORD out of all nations upon horses, and in chariots, and in litters, and upon mules, and upon camels, to my holy mountain Jerusalem, says the LORD, as the children of Israel bring an offering in a clean vessel into the house of the LORD. Brethren, as the converts may justly be styled. (Calmet) Coaches, (carrucis. ) Hebrew circa Roth, (Haydock) "dromedaries "(Bo chart) "with songs of praise. "(Chaldean) The precise import is unknown. Truth shall show its sweet force. Offering; the first-fruits, brought by all with great solemnity, Deuteronomy xxvi. , and 2 Thessalonians ii.
